keyFindings.description: CI envoy-go check fails: TestHTTPServer_StartAndStop WhatsApp MCP timeout. Unrelated to this PR (internal/mcpbridge package, not modified). Main passes consistently. Likely flaky — needs re-run or separate fix.

Issue AC specifies 3 integration tests (transfer, no-prior-holder, idempotent). Only transfer test added as integration test. Other two covered by unit tests in kv_test.go which also use testcontainers NATS.
subscribeControllerToEnvoy() uses global fetch instead of injected deps.fetch. Daemon tests log 404 for /v1/roles/set. Pre-existing pattern but worsened by adding the role claim call.
Redundant nil check in roleSetHandler (line 227) — readiness gate already ensures deps non-nil.
Historical plan document still references old topic. Not runtime code.
